channel.title: Vibeops on William Collins
channel.description: Recent content in Vibeops on William Collins

item.title: Vibe Coding Got Us Here. Can Spec-Driven Development Save Us?
item.description: Let me paint you a picture. It’s 2025. You’ve discovered that you can describe a feature in plain English and an LLM will just… build it. The dopamine hit rivals or even eclipses social media. You feel as if you’re shipping things in an afternoon that used to take a week. You’re not reading diffs. You’re not understanding the internals. You’re just vibing - and it feels amazing.
